ticket.title: Landing page de-slop: hero visual anchor, layout, motion
ticket.description: Redesign the landing page away from generic AI-slop: a real hero visual anchor, intentional layout, and motion - within the forest/yellow token system and the frontend conventions.

candidate_memory.link_reason: the token system the redesign must use

code_agent.rationale: code_agent keeps the in-scope codebase context; release/workspace is out of scope, stale entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'Beta goal: first 100 users', 'PRD v5.2 locked decisions' are in scope but tangential here (optional).

qa_agent.rationale: qa_agent keeps the in-scope codebase context; project/workspace is out of scope, stale entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'a linked ticket Executable Launch Plan' is in scope but tangential here (optional).

design_agent.rationale: design_agent keeps the in-scope project/workspace context; codebase/release is out of scope, stale entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'Agent security policy' is in scope but tangential here (optional).

product_agent.rationale: product_agent keeps the in-scope project/release/workspace context; codebase is out of scope, stale entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'Agent security policy', 'CONVENTIONS.md — input revalidation (Convention 9)' are in scope but tangential here (optional).

human_teammate.rationale: Robin (the baseline owner) sees the current team entries plus their own local note.
